name: Helium MCP
description: Remote MCP server for real-time news intelligence with bias scoring (3.2M+ articles, 5000+ sources, 15+ dimensions), financial market data (stocks, ETFs, crypto, AI bull/bear cases), ML options pricing (probability ITM, Greeks, fair value), balanced news synthesis, trending topics, and meme search. [Documentation](https://heliumtrades.com/mcp-page/)
